editorial_reasoning.calendar_tier: TIER 2 — NFL Draft Week. The 2026 NFL Draft is next week (April 23-25) making this NFL Draft heavy coverage week. NBA Play-In Tournament ongoing but secondary to draft dominance.
editorial_reasoning.dominant_topic: NFL Draft week dominates — Tier 2 calendar event confirmed by tweet volume and Kiper's final mock dropping

candidates_considered.hook: Final predictions, trade possibilities, one week out drama
Steph's 35 points, Kawhi elimination, Clippers season over
CONTINUING from yesterday — new development of actual training starting
Trip + cursing = expensive night, no suspension
Maxey 31, Embiid missed another big game

stories.headline: Kiper's Final Mock: Raiders Lock in Mendoza, Jets Chaos at No. 2
stories.editorial_direction: This is draft week — go deep on the final predictions, surprise picks, and trade scenarios. Focus on the drama of final week intel and which teams might shock everyone.

tweets.text:
This year's full and final mock draft from Mel Kiper Jr.:

https://www.espn.com/nfl/draft2026/story/_/id/48478995/2026-nfl-mock-draft-mel-kiper-two-rounds-64-picks-final-predictions

Here's my top 150 prospects in the 2026 NFL Draft.

One week until Round 1:

https://www.espn.com/nfl/draft2026/story/_/id/47590505/2026-nfl-draft-rankings-board-top-prospects-best-positional-field-yates
Jets had all the information they already needed on David Bailey; they felt there was no reason for a visit.

key_stats: Raiders at No. 1 with Fernando Mendoza locked in
Jets at No. 2 debating between prospects
Two potential trades projected in first two rounds
research_notes.historical_context: Final mock drafts often differ dramatically from reality — Kiper's track record of surprises vs accurate predictions
key_moments: Jets didn't need Bailey visit — suggests they're looking elsewhere
Cardinals visiting with Ty Simpson on final visit day
cross_connections: Draft is in Pittsburgh — Steelers have home field advantage for local connections
One week out creates final desperate moves
meme_angles: Kiper hair jokes never get old
Jets chaos at No. 2 is brand consistent
Mock draft 'experts' about to be proven wrong
research_notes.where_it_goes: Draft is April 23-25 in Pittsburgh — this is the final intel before teams make real decisions
research_notes.internet_sentiment: Mix of excitement for draft week and skepticism about mock accuracy
research_notes.award_implications: Early picks determine Rookie of the Year landscape, team building philosophies

stories.headline: Steph Saves Warriors Season, Eliminates Kawhi's Clippers
stories.editorial_direction: Focus on Curry's vintage performance despite slow start, Kawhi's elimination, and Clippers' season ending with investigation hanging over them.

tweets.text: Draymond Green had Kawhi Leonard in HELL. Bro even had a facial expression for the first time EVER 😭💀

Gui Santos vs LAC:

20 PTS
7 REB
5 AST
9-13 FG

Going into tonight, he only averaged 2.4 PPG in the postseason.

Charles Barkley COOKING the Clippers 😂😭

"I've been poor, I've been rich, I've been fat, I've been skinny, I've been old, I've been in the Hall of Fame and one thing I can always tell you,the Clippers have ALWAYS sucked"

key_stats: Curry 35 points, 27 in second half comeback
research_notes.historical_context: Curry's vintage Play-In performance, Clippers perpetual playoff disappointment
key_moments: Curry struggled first half, exploded in second
Clippers season ends with investigation pending
meme_angles: CP3 posting on Instagram after Clippers loss
research_notes.where_it_goes: Warriors advance to face Suns Friday, Clippers offseason with cap circumvention investigation

stories.headline: NFL Starts Training Replacement Officials
stories.editorial_direction: CONTINUING STORY — yesterday covered the onboarding memo. Today's new development: actual training sessions scheduled for next month. Brief mention of background checks completed, physical exams upcoming.

tweets.text:
The NFL has started onboarding potential replacement officials as the expiration of its collective bargaining agreement with the NFL Referees Association approaches, clubs were informed Wednesday in a memo.

More via @SeifertESPN:

https://www.espn.com/nfl/story/_/id/48497778/memo-nfl-begins-onboarding-potential-replacement-officials

key_stats: Training sessions scheduled for next month
Background checks already completed for some officials
research_notes.where_it_goes: Replacement officials could start with June 1 offseason practices if no agreement reached

stories.headline: LaMelo Ball's $60K Night: Trip, Cursing, No Suspension
stories.editorial_direction: Report the facts — $35K for flagrant foul upgrade on Bam trip, $25K for postgame cursing, no suspension. Keep it factual.

tweets.text:
The NBA is fining Charlotte's LaMelo Ball $35,000 for his trip of Miami's Bam Adebayo and upgrading the action to a Flagrant, plus fining him $25,000 for cursing postgame, sources tell ESPN. 

$60K in fines, Flagrant. No suspension.

LaVar Ball GOES OFF on Nick Wright for calling LaMelo Ball a "clown"

"I bet if you look in a dictionary right now and you look up a clown you gon see 2 things… somebody with some long hair on the sides and a big ass nose. Yup that's Nick Wright" 😭💀

meme_angles: LaVar defending LaMelo with Nick Wright roast
research_notes.where_it_goes: Hornets advance in Play-In, Ball available for next game

stories.headline: 76ers Survive Without Embiid, Beat Magic Behind Maxey's 31
stories.editorial_direction: Embiid missing another big game, Maxey stepping up, 76ers advance to face Celtics. Keep it brief.

tweets.text:
Tyrese Maxey vs Orlando:

31 PTS
6 AST
3 3P

Hasn't averaged under 20 PPG in a playoff run since his rookie season.

key_stats: Embiid out again for big game
research_notes.where_it_goes: 76ers face Celtics in first round starting soon

around_the_league.text: Dolphins running back De'Von Achane is "not available" for a trade, general manager Jon-Eric Sullivan said Wednesday, as the team looks to sign him to an extension.

A'ja Wilson, the WNBA's first ever four-time MVP, is signing a three-year, $5 million supermax contract to return to the Las Vegas Aces, sources tell me and @Andraya_Carter. The deal, which is the largest in WNBA history to date and fully guaranteed, was negotiated by Jade-Li English of Klutch Sports Group.

Nah man this is INSANE 

Chris Paul posted this on his IG Story after the Clippers lost. They sent him home earlier in the season lmaooo

REAL TEARS 😂😂😂

Kawhi Leonard this season:

— 27.9 PPG (career-high)
— 6.4 RPG 
— 1.9 SPG 
— 50/39/89%
— 62.9 TS% (career-high)

The third most PPG by a player in their 14th season in NBA history.
On the final day that prospects are allowed to make pre-draft 30 visits, Alabama QB Ty Simpson is visiting the Arizona Cardinals today.

Florida's Alex Condon – the No. 30 prospect on ESPN's Top 100 – is returning to the Gators for his senior year, he tells me and @JeremyWoo. Condon will be a projected first-rounder in 2027 and among the top big men in college basketball.

Nico Hoerner vs Phillies:

3-5
1 HR
5 RBI
2 R
1 SB

The first Cub with 10 H+R+RBI in a game this season.
I keep looking at the W and the spear and its giving me anxiety. I cant tell if its possible or not. Now imagine being a opponent trying to figure that out. Sun Tzu
